title: Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
summary_full: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.
summary_public: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.
